name: writing-plans
description: Create implementation plans from approved specs before code changes begin, with reviewer subagent checks.

interface.shortDescription: Turn approved specs into reviewed implementation plans.
interface.longDescription: Write detailed, test-driven implementation plans from approved design docs or requirements, with file maps, bite-sized tasks, commands, expected results, and reviewer subagent checks.
defaultPrompt: Use writing-plans to create an implementation plan from this spec.
Use writing-plans to break this approved design into testable tasks.
Use writing-plans before implementing these requirements.
